title: Add proof-of-API integration test for ferrolearn-neighbors
description:
Final step of #242. tests/api_proof.rs exercising every public API of ferrolearn-neighbors end-to-end:
- KNeighborsClassifier / FittedKNeighborsClassifier: fit, predict, predict_proba, score, kneighbors, kneighbors_graph, classes/n_classes
- KNeighborsRegressor: fit, predict, score, kneighbors, kneighbors_graph
- RadiusNeighborsClassifier: fit, predict, predict_proba, score, radius_neighbors, radius_neighbors_graph
- RadiusNeighborsRegressor: fit, predict, score, radius_neighbors, radius_neighbors_graph
- NearestNeighbors: fit, kneighbors, radius_neighbors, kneighbors_graph, radius_neighbors_graph, n_samples_fit, shape
- NearestCentroid: fit, predict, score, centroids
- LocalOutlierFactor: fit, fit_predict, predict (novelty), decision_function, score_samples, lof_scores, threshold
- KdTree, BallTree: smoke construction + nearest-neighbor query
- Free functions: kneighbors_graph, radius_neighbors_graph, sort_graph_by_row_values
- All Algorithm and Weights enum variants
